summary.intent: Change the default CLI report mode from 'terminal' to 'json' for the evaluate command, as raw/terminal output is less useful than structured JSON output.
summary.outcome: Successfully changed the default --report option value to 'json' in the CLI, committed the change with passing pre-commit hooks (1351 tests, lint, typecheck), and updated CHANGELOG.md.

repo: Project uses pre-commit hooks that run tests, lint, and typecheck before allowing commits
Test suite has 1351 tests and is run with 'bun run test'
Linting is run with 'bun run lint'
CHANGELOG.md follows Keep a Changelog format with an [Unreleased] section

code.finding: The --report CLI option default value is defined here; changed from 'terminal' to 'json'. The option string format is: .option("--report <mode>", "description", defaultValue)

workflow: Tests and lint were run in parallel for efficiency
Commit message format follows conventional commits style based on project history
Changelog is updated as part of the commit, not as a separate step
